ops.title: P0: bootstrap daemonkit repo
ops.description: Create github.com/yasyf/daemonkit via repo-bootstrap (Go + swift layers; go.mod and Package.swift both at repo root). FIRST commit after bootstrap: scripts/test.sh ulimit fork-bomb harness (before any proc test exists). CI: vet/test/-race via harness + CGO_ENABLED=0 build + swift test, macOS + Linux.

ops.text: Repo exists with Go module + SPM package at root, bootstrapped via repo-bootstrap
scripts/test.sh harness is the first post-bootstrap commit and CI runs all Go tests through it (no bare go test anywhere)
